subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Youth unto those who have been guided by God, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, and have detached themselves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الغلام الی الذین هم اهتدوا بالله المقتدر العزیز العلام و انقطعوا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
